full_prompt: Design the primary tubular roll-cage space frame for a single-seat Elektrikli (Electric) category vehicle competing in the national aerospace student benchmark 2025 Efficiency Challenge. The complete car including driver (75 kg reference) and battery pack (15 kg) must have a dry curb weight below 180 kg. The chassis is a tubular space frame using seamless AISI 4130 chromoly tubing with minimum main-hoop and front-hoop OD of 25.4 mm (1 inch) and wall thickness 2.4 mm; secondary bracing may use 22.2 mm OD x 1.65 mm wall. Material properties: Young's modulus 205 GPa, yield strength 460 MPa, ultimate tensile strength 560 MPa, density 7850 kg/m^3. The frame envelope is length 2.6 m, width 1.3 m, height 1.1 m (with driver seated, helmet clearance 50 mm). A crash-box impact attenuator bolts to the front bulkhead and must absorb 7350 J (equivalent to 180 kg at 9 m/s front impact) while not transmitting more than 40 g average deceleration to the driver cell. Load cases to verify on the bare roll-cage (crash box handled as a separate absorber): (LC1) front impact: 7 g deceleration applied to 180 kg mass, reacting at the front bulkhead; (LC2) side impact: 20 kN applied laterally at the driver cell side-impact bar; (LC3) rear impact: 6 g deceleration on 180 kg reacting at the rear bulkhead; (LC4) rollover: 1.5 x 180 kg x 9.81 = 2650 N applied vertically downward at the main-hoop apex while the four wheel pads are pinned; (LC5) torsion: 800 N applied upward at one front wheel pad, 800 N downward at the diagonally opposite rear wheel pad, the other two pinned. Pass/fail criteria: (R1) maximum von Mises stress under every load case must remain below 306 MPa (460 / 1.5 yield FoS per FIA Appendix J Article 253 conservative gate); (R2) maximum main-hoop deflection under LC4 rollover must remain below 25 mm measured from undeflected apex to deformed apex; (R3) torsional stiffness measured from LC5 must exceed 2500 N*m/deg to meet typical efficiency-EV handling target; (R4) frame dry mass (tubes + gussets + bulkhead plates, excluding crash box) must not exceed 45 kg; (R5) first global torsional mode must exceed 35 Hz. The crash-box impact-attenuator energy-absorption check (7350 J with <= 40 g average) is evaluated in a separate nonlinear dynamic analysis and is not a linear-FEA pass/fail for this frame spec; include a note stating it is out-of-scope for this submission but referenced for design intent. Thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses not required; buckling is captured implicitly by the stress gate on tubes at this slenderness. Deliverables: STEP AP242 assembly with each tube section as a separate body, weld pattern schedule, FEA report with stress per load case, torsional stiffness computation from LC5, modal report, and mass budget.
short_prompt:
Design the primary tubular roll-cage space frame of a single-seat Elektrikli Efficiency Challenge vehicle in the national aerospace student benchmark 2025. Driver 75 kg + 15 kg battery pack; chassis dry curb below 180 kg. Frame AISI 4130 chromoly, main-hoop 25.4 mm x 2.4 mm, side bracing 22.2 mm x 1.65 mm; envelope 2.6 x 1.3 x 1.1 m with 50 mm helmet clearance. A separate crash-box attenuator is out of scope for this FEA (but must absorb 7350 J at <= 40 g avg, 180 kg x 9 m/s).

Factor regime: FIA Appendix J Art 253 conservative yield FoS 1.5 (306 MPa); torsional-stiffness target > 2500 N-m/deg; first global torsional mode > 35 Hz.

Load cases.
- Front impact: 7 g decel on 180 kg at the front bulkhead.
- Side impact: 20 kN at the side-impact bar.
- Rear impact: 6 g decel on 180 kg at the rear bulkhead.
- Rollover: 1.5 x 180 kg x 9.81 = 2650 N vertical down at the hoop apex with four wheel pads pinned.
- Torsion: 800 N up at one front pad, 800 N down at the diagonally opposite rear pad, others pinned.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Crash-box 7350 J energy absorption with <=40 g transmitted deceleration is handled by explicit-dynamics (LS-DYNA / Radioss / Abaqus Explicit), not linear FEA. Flagged as separate submission.

prompt.title: national aerospace student benchmark 2025 Efficiency Challenge Electric Vehicle Roll-Cage Space Frame
prompt.brief: Seamless AISI 4130 chromoly tubular roll-cage for <180 kg EV, 2.6 x 1.3 x 1.1 m envelope, FIA-style safety gates.

load_cases.name: rollover
load_cases.application: main-hoop apex downward, wheel pads pinned

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: beam (BEAM188) with tube cross-section; solid TET10 at welded nodes for refinement

exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: EV pack thermal handled separately; chassis static at ambient.
exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: No aero load imposed for chassis sizing.
